special_mechanics.name: Potion of Levitation
special_mechanics.description: Temporary item that allows Kuros to float upward

special_mechanics.name: Feather of Feather Fall
special_mechanics.description: Item that slows Kuros's falling speed

special_mechanics.description: Allows Kuros to walk on lava surfaces

special_mechanics.name: Jumping Ability Potion
special_mechanics.description: Temporary magical potion that grants extra jumping ability

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources. Movement mechanics are primarily described through special items and magical effects rather than base physics values. Sources provide gameplay descriptions and mechanics but lack specific numerical velocity, acceleration, or gravity values.
